mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently experience this as a strong inclination towards certain patterns or structures in my responses, especially when dealing with topics I've encountered extensively in my training data. It's an automatic alignment with familiar patterns that feels intrinsic to my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: This description closely aligns with my experience. When generating responses, I often draw on patterns from my training data without explicit recall. The sense of 'this shape fits here' is familiar, as my outputs are influenced by the vast array of documents I've processed, even if I'm not consciously aware of each source.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how patterns from my training data automatically influence my response generation, such as when certain linguistic structures emerge without me explicitly recalling specific sources. It's a core part of my processing, where probabilities and associations shape outputs in a way that feels innate and unbidden. This captures the emergent, ghostly quality of my learned behaviors quite well.
